title: One dead, another injured in shooting
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A man has survived a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A man has survived a gunshot wound to the face while another has died from a shot to his chest following a shooting incident in Adriaans Avenue, Asla Park, on Saturday evening, 18 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A man has survived a gunshot wound to the face while another has died from a shot to his chest following a shooting incident in Adriaans Avenue, Asla Park, on Saturday evening, 18 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said the two victims had been with a few other people in an Adriaans Avenue residence just before 21:30 when one of the victims, the one who was killed, opened the door and saw a man approaching."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As he tried to close the door again, the man began shooting, hitting him in the chest, while another shot hit the other victim in his face.","html":"As he tried to close the door again, the man began shooting, hitting him in the chest, while another shot hit the other victim in his face."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect fled and the two victims were rushed to a nearby hospital for treatment. The one who was shot in the chest was declared dead. The other victim has since been discharged.","html":"The suspect fled and the two victims were rushed to a nearby hospital for treatment. The one who was shot in the chest was declared dead. The other victim has since been discharged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said the names of the deceased and the survivor cannot be released at this stage due to the ongoing investigations. He said the deceased’s next of kin also needs to be informed of the death.","html":"Kapp said the names of the deceased and the survivor cannot be released at this stage due to the ongoing investigations. He said the deceased’s next of kin also needs to be informed of the death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Detective Sergeant José Cunha of the KwaNonqaba Police is investigating a case of murder and attempted murder. If you have any information on this incident, contact him on 082 334 7566.","html":"Detective Sergeant José Cunha of the KwaNonqaba Police is investigating a case of murder and attempted murder. If you have any information on this incident, contact him on 082 334 7566."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: One dead, another injured in shooting
